pause.title: Game Paused
pause.subtitle: Take a breath — jump back in when ready.

sandbox.fullForced: Sandbox (no lives, no score · power-ups from the start) — ON (code)
sandbox.fullOn: Sandbox (no lives, no score · power-ups from the start) — ON
sandbox.fullOff: Sandbox (no lives, no score · power-ups from the start) — OFF

tipsClassic.title: How to play
tipsClassic.body: Tiles fall in three colors. Match each falling number with the small badge of that color in the top-right — chains go 1 → 9 → 1.

tipsClassic.title: Wrong taps
tipsClassic.body: Tapping the wrong number resets that color's chain to 1 and drops your combo multiplier back to ×1.

tipsClassic.title: Lives
tipsClassic.body: If the tile showing your color's next number reaches the bottom without being tapped, you lose a heart. Other numbers can fall away safely.

tipsClassic.title: Combo & power-ups
tipsClassic.body: Every correct hit raises your combo for more points. Every 10 correct hits in a row earns a power-up — tap the icons along the bottom when you need them.
